title: Podon
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Podon''' was a type of [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]] grown on [[Tree/Legends|trees]] in orchards on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]]. They were sturdy enough to be packed by [[Droid/Legends|droids]] as opposed to by [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]]. Podon was an ingredient in sweet tarts, along with [[brandifert]]. The fruit could also be made into [[podon cider]].<ref name="CotJ">[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]</ref> The [[Mluki]] government relied on [[R0/5T.N1 tree feeder]]s to maintain the podon orchards.<ref name="EGTD">''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>

{{Flora-stub}}
